payload.answer: SQL query execution denied. BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED is set to false, which disables direct SQL access to memory_cards. Use standard Brain query APIs instead.
payload.decision: Query blocked - BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false prevents direct SQL access

entity_resolution.reason: Debug SQL flag explicitly disabled; direct SQL queries not permitted in this mode

payload.intent: Execute SQL query on memory_cards table with debug SQL disabled

details: Request rejected at access control layer

repair_options: Enable BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=true if authorized for debug access
Use Brain query API: /brain query <natural language>
Use Brain admin commands with appropriate permissions
